scores.justification: Every surfaced issue has an explicit severity label (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) and specific, actionable remediation steps (e.g., 'unsuspend u042', 'implement SKU re-mapping', 'add email validation', 'run full physical inventory count').

The report avoids generic platitudes and instead cites concrete IDs throughout (tickets t019/t010/t027/t029/t025, orders o102/o107/o115, users u042/u020/u033/u004/u031, products p014/p037/p061/p039/p045) with specific evidence and actionable commands.
